# NeuralShift

NeuralShift builds the operational backbone of Sri Lanka's best F&B businesses —
replacing manual chaos with a system that thinks alongside your operation. It is
operational infrastructure (orders, kitchen, stock, suppliers, billing, staff)
run through one connected system, built from scratch for each business.

Area served: Sri Lanka (Colombo, Galle).

## BizCore

BizCore is a single operating system for an F&B business — not a collection of
tools. Every module is connected, so changing one thing updates the whole system
and every number lives in one place. Modules: Order Management, Kitchen Display
(KDS), Inventory Control, Billing & POS, Customer CRM, Revenue Analytics,
Workflow Automation, WhatsApp Integration, Supplier Management. Trilingual
support across English, Sinhala, and Tamil (EN / SI / TA).

## System levels

- Foundation — from 175K setup + Rs 25,000/month, 3-week delivery.
- Growth — from 280K setup + Rs 45,000/month, 4-week delivery.
- Full Operating System — from 500K setup + Rs 75,000/month, 6-week delivery.

All pricing in Sri Lankan Rupees. Setup is split across three milestones:
50% on signing, 30% on delivery, 20% at day 30.

## Pricing entry point

Most businesses start with the Operational Audit: a one-time 5,000 LKR, 90-minute
visit where the team maps every order flow, stock movement, and manual task and
returns a full operations map with written recommendations and no obligation. The
5,000 LKR is credited 100% toward a system build if you proceed.
